1.name: Malleable Visage
1.description: A vampire with this power may alter their bodily parameters: height, build, voice, facial features, and skin tone, among other things. Such changes are cosmetic and minor in scope. They might, for example, resume their mortal coloration; make themselves resemble a Moor, Viking, or Saracen, or even copy the form of a web-fingered naiad or faerie noble.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 172
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 186
Dark Ages: Vampire Rulebook Pg. 222

4.name: Horrid Form
4.description: Transform into the war-form zulo; the transformation takes 2 turns to complete.

5.name: Bloodform
5.description: Instantly transform into a pool of sentient vitae

5.name: Inner Mastery
5.description: Alter internal processings of the body, even manipulating mental attributes or giving derangements.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 108-109
Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 113

5.name: The Body Impolitic
5.description: Infuse parts of your body with your will to allow them to be severed from the trunk to do your bidding
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 269

6.name: Body Arsenal
6.description: Transform the bones in your body into weapons
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 113
Laws of Elysium Pg. 78

6.name: Blood of Acid
6.description: Permanently make your vitae highly corrosive
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 113
Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 123
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 243

6.name: Chiropteran Marauder
6.description: Transform into a huge, flying bat
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 173
Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 123
Dark Ages: Vampire Rulebook Pg. 223

6.name: Corrupt Construction
6.description: Create a frankenstein monster (such as a Vozhd) by adding pieces of dead bodies onto a living being
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 96

6.name: Ecstatic Agony
6.description: Change the pain of wounds into pleasure
references: Lore of the Clans Pg. 241

6.name: Entrail Saraband
6.description: Turn your bowels into writhing tendrils
references: Libellus Sanguinis 1: Masters of the State Pg. 65

6.name: Graft Life to Life
6.description: Attach the limbs of one person to another without it becoming useless
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 162

6.name: Living Testudo
6.description: Use a victim as a living weapon and shield
references: Libellus Sanguinis 1: Masters of the State Pg. 65

6.name: Plasmic Form
6.description: As Bloodform, except you can move and hold any shape as a pool
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 113
Laws of Elysium Pg. 78

6.name: Skin Trap
6.description: Peel off a layer of skin to use as a net
references: Clanbook: Tzimisce Pg. 45

7.name: Blood of the Earth
7.description: Your Blood becomes a viscous substance that burns when it is exposed to air.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 270

7.name: Cocoon
7.description: Wrap yourself into an incredibly resilient shell
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 113
Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 124
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 243

7.name: Flesh Rot
7.description: Give a target a disease that eats away at their body
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 113

7.name: Impaler's Fence
7.description: Cause a victim's spine to shoot up and down them
references: Libellus Sanguinis 1: Masters of the State Pg. 65

7.name: Kraken's Kiss
7.description: Transform your face into a tentacle that can drain blood
references: Clanbook: Tzimisce Pg. 45
Lore of the Clans Pg. 241

7.name: Liquefy the Mortal Coil
7.description: Turn victim body parts into blood.
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 96

7.name: Transcend the Flesh
7.description: Expel foreign substances from your body or move through solid objects
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 162

8.name: Bauble
8.description: Transform into an object no bigger than your normal size
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

8.name: Breath of the Dragon
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

8.name: Oathbreaker
8.description: Transform your blood into a substance that can suborn foreign Blood Bonds for a limited period of time

8.name: Sculpture of the Mind
8.description: Use Vicissitude over a distance by spending a Willpower point

8.name: Sublimation of the Larval Flesh
8.description: Weave the flesh of target into a cocoon to transform it into a new form

8.name: Will over Form
8.description: Use Vicissitude without one's hands over a distance
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 163

9.name: Doppelgänger
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

9.name: Earth's Vast Haven
9.description: Dissolve your body into the earth

9.name: Perfect Essence
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 163

9.name: The Last Dracul
9.description: Assume a draconic form whose blood incinerates when it is in contact with air

references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114
